title: GK Smart Trend HUD TP1-TP3
author: hgavin780
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: GK Smart Trend HUD TP1-TP3 by hgavin780.

GK Smart Trend HUD TP1-TP3 — Full Description GK Smart Trend HUD TP1-TP3 is a complete trend + trade-management HUD built around a Zero-Lag moving average ribbon with ATR deviation bands, designed to deliver clean GK BUY / GK SELL signals and then manage the trade visually with: Entry price TP1 / TP2 / TP3 (ATR-based targets) Band-based SL (with ATR buffer) Live hit tracking (✅/❌) TP2 “SECURE PROFITS NOW” banner SESSION label (ASIA / LONDON / NEW YORK / OFF) POWER strength reading OB/OS … GK Sma
